Part.Source:
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */

Event Start retornaAutorizacao.Call('WPMONITORACERTIFICADOS', Status_SimNao.Sim, 1, &AutNiv) LoadWWPContext.Call(&Context) &FiltroKey = 'FLT#wpMonitoraCertificadosColumnsSelector' &UmZero = LoadColumnsSelectorState.Udp(&FiltroKey) Do CAse Case &UmZero = '2' &SalvarFiltro = false Case &UmZero = '1' &SalvarFiltro = true Otherwise RetornaConfUsuario.Call(&Context.EmpCod, &Context.PesCod, domConfUsuario.Uconf001_PadraoFiltro, &UmZero) if &UmZero = '2' &SalvarFiltro = false Else &SalvarFiltro = true EndiF EndCase //&PesAviCer = Status_SimNao.Sim // if &PesTip.IsEmpty() // &PesTip = TipoPessoa.JURIDICA // EndIf if &PesDtaVctCer.IsEmpty() &PesDtaVctCer = YMDtoD(year(&Today), month(&Today), 1) Endif if &PesDtaVctCer_To.IsEmpty() &PesDtaVctCer_To = EoM(&Today) Endif /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Grid.Rows = Page.Rows Grid_Empowerer.GridInternalName = Grid.InternalName JSDynamicFilters.Caption = '' &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PESCPF' Do 'EnableDynamicFilters1' &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PESCPF' Do 'EnableDynamicFilters2' &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PESCPF' Do 'EnableDynamicFilters3' AddDynamicFilters1.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterShow_AL('%1', 2, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) RemoveDynamicFilters1.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterHideLast_AL('%1', 3, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) AddDynamicFilters2.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterShow_AL('%1', 3, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) RemoveDynamicFilters2.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterHideLast_AL('%1', 3, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) RemoveDynamicFilters3.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterHideLast_AL('%1', 3, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) &ExppData = new() &ExppDataItem = new() &ExppDataItem.Title = 'Excel' &ExppDataItem.Icon = ActionExport.Link() &ExppDataItem.EventKey = !'Excel' &ExppDataItem.IsDivider = False &ExppData.Add(&ExppDataItem) &ExppDataItem = new() &ExppDataItem.Title = 'Exportar PDF' &ExppDataItem.Icon = ActionExportReport.Link() &ExppDataItem.EventKey = !'ExportReport' &ExppDataItem.IsDivider = False &ExppData.Add(&ExppDataItem) &ExppDataItem = new() &ExppDataItem.Title = 'Exportar E-mails' &ExppDataItem.Icon = menu_users.Link() &ExppDataItem.EventKey = !'exportemail' &ExppDataItem.IsDivider = False &ExppData.Add(&ExppDataItem) If (&SalvarFiltro = false) &ExppDataItem = new() &ExppDataItem.Title = 'Salvar Filtros' &ExppDataItem.Icon = ActionManageFilters.Link() &ExppDataItem.EventKey = !'SalvaFiltros' &ExppDataItem.IsDivider = False &ExppData.Add(&ExppDataItem) Endif If (&SalvarFiltro = true) &ExppDataItem = new() &ExppDataItem.Title = 'Não Salvar Filtros' &ExppDataItem.Icon = ActionCleanFilters.Link() &ExppDataItem.EventKey = !'NaoSalvar' &ExppDataItem.IsDivider = False &ExppData.Add(&ExppDataItem) Endif &ExppDataItem = new() &ExppDataItem.Title = 'Teste 1' &ExppDataItem.EventKey = !'Teste1' &ExppDataItem.IsDivider = False &ExppData.Add(&ExppDataItem) &ExppDataItem = new() &ExppDataItem.Title = 'Teste 2' &ExppDataItem.EventKey = !'Teste2' &ExppDataItem.IsDivider = False &ExppData.Add(&ExppDataItem) &PesTip = nullvalue(&PesTip) &PesAviCer = nullvalue(&PesAviCer) &PesSts = nullvalue(&PesSts) DDO_Grid.GridInternalName = Grid.InternalName Form.Caption = ' Cadastro Pessoas' Do 'PrepareTransaction' Do 'LoadGridState' If &OrderedBy < 1 &OrderedBy = 1 Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' EndIf &DDO_TitleSettingsIcons = GetWWPTitleSettingsIcons() GridPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue = Grid.Rows /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ LoadWWPContext.Call(&Context) Do 'SaveGridState' &GridCurrentPage = Grid.CurrentPage &GridPageCount = Grid.PageCount &gridPesRaz.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn' &IsCliente.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn' PesDtaVctCer.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn' &auxPesAvisar.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event GridPaginationBar.ChangePage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Previous' Grid.PreviousPage() Case GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Next' Grid.NextPage() Otherwise &PageToGo.FromString(GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage) Grid.GotoPage(&PageToGo) EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event GridPaginationBar.ChangeRowsPerPage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Grid.Rows = GridPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue Grid.FirstPage() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event DDO_Grid.OnOptionClicked /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case DDO_Grid.ActiveEventKey = !'<#OrderASC#>' OR DDO_Grid.ActiveEventKey = !'<#OrderDSC#>' &OrderedBy.FromString(DDO_Grid.SelectedValue_get) &OrderedDsc = iif(DDO_Grid.ActiveEventKey = !'<#OrderDSC#>', true, false) Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' Grid.FirstPage() EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event Grid.Load RetornaUltimaLIgacaoData.Call(EmpCod, PesCod, 'A', &PesPrxLigDta) &Editar.TooltipText = "GXM_update" &Editar.Link = wpPessoa.Link('WPMONITORACERTIFICADOS', 'UPD', EmpCod, PesCod) &IsCliente = false if not PesEmpSecCod.IsEmpty() &IsCliente = true EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &Editar = !'' &AddObserva = !'' &Socio = !'' &AddSocio = !'' &WhatsApp = !'' &gridPesRaz = PesCodRaz if PesCodRaz.Length() > 30 &gridPesRaz = substr(PesCodRaz,1,30)+ '...' Endif If PesTip = 'J' //JURIDICA &CpfCnpj = PesCnpj Else &CpfCnpj = PesCpf EndIF &gridPesCidNom = PesCidUfeCod.Trim() +' / '+ PesCidNom.Trim() Do Case CAse PesAviCer = Status_SimNao.Nao &AuxPesAvisar = 'NÃO' CAse PesAviCer = Status_SimNao.Sim &AuxPesAvisar = 'SIM' Otherwise &AuxPesAvisar = '???' EndCase RetornaPrimeiroContato.Call(EmpCod, PesCod, &PesFonCon) RetornaAdministradores.call(EmpCod,PesCod,&Adms) Do Case Case PesSts <> Status_AtivoInativo.ATIVO &gridPesRaz.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnDanger WWColumnDangerSingleCell' Case not PesEmpSecCod.IsEmpty() &gridPesRaz.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnSuccess WWColumnSuccessSingleCell' Otherwise &gridPesRaz.ColumnClass = 'WWColumn' EndCase &IsCliente.ColumnClass = iif(not PesEmpSecCod.IsEmpty(), !'WWColumn WWColumnSuccess WWColumnSuccessSingleCell', !'WWColumn') Do Case Case PesDtaVctCer < Serverdate() - 30 PesDtaVctCer.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnTag WWColumnTagDanger WWColumnTagDangerSingleCell' Case PesDtaVctCer < Serverdate() + 30 PesDtaVctCer.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnTag WWColumnTagWarning WWColumnTagWarningSingleCell' Otherwise PesDtaVctCer.ColumnClass = 'WWColumn' EndCase Do Case Case PesAviCer = Status_SimNao.Sim &auxPesAvisar.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnSuccess WWColumnSuccessSingleCell' Case PesAviCer = Status_SimNao.Nao &auxPesAvisar.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnDanger WWColumnDangerSingleCell' Case PesAviCer.Isnull() or PesAviCer.IsEmpty() &auxPesAvisar.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnBold WWColumnBoldSingleCell' Otherwise &auxPesAvisar.ColumnClass = 'WWColumn' EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'AddDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 = True AddDynamicFilters1.Visible = False RemoveDynamicFilters1.Visible = True /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'RemoveDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersRemoving = True &DynamicFiltersIgnoreFirst = True Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' Do 'ResetDynFilters' Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' &DynamicFiltersRemoving = False &DynamicFiltersIgnoreFirst = False Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &DynamicFiltersSelector1.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do 'EnableDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'AddDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 = True AddDynamicFilters2.Visible = False RemoveDynamicFilters2.Visible = True /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'RemoveDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersRemoving = True &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 = False Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' Do 'ResetDynFilters' Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' &DynamicFiltersRemoving = False Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &DynamicFiltersSelector2.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do 'EnableDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'RemoveDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersRemoving = True &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 = False Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' Do 'ResetDynFilters' Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' &DynamicFiltersRemoving = False Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &DynamicFiltersSelector3.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do 'EnableDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &AddObserva.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ wpAgendaEmissao.PopUp(PesCod) Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &Socio.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ wpSocios.PopUp(EmpCod, PesCod) Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &AddSocio.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ wpSocio.PopUp('UPD', EmpCod, PesCod, 0) Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &WhatsApp.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ wpSelecionarFoneEnvio.PopUp(EmpCod, PesCod) Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoInserir' wpNovaPessoa.Popup('CLI', 0, '') refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoPequisaFone' wpPesquisaFone.Popup(&PesCod) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoListagemClientes' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ wpListagemClientes.Call() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event ddo_Expp.OnOptionClicked /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case ddo_Expp.ActiveEventKey = !'Excel' Do 'Do Excel' Case ddo_Expp.ActiveEventKey = !'ExportReport' Do 'DoExportReport' Case ddo_Expp.ActiveEventKey = !'exportemail' Do 'Do exportemail' Case ddo_Expp.ActiveEventKey = !'SalvaFiltros' Do 'Do SalvaFiltros' Case ddo_Expp.ActiveEventKey = !'NaoSalvar' Do 'Do NaoSalvar' Case ddo_Expp.ActiveEventKey = !'Teste1' Do 'Do Teste1' Case ddo_Expp.ActiveEventKey = !'Teste2' Do 'Do Teste2' EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Sub 'SetDDOSortedStatus' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ DDO_Grid.SortedStatus = &OrderedBy.ToString().Trim() + !':' + iif(&OrderedDsc, !'DSC', !'ASC') /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'EnableDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &PesCpf1.Visible = False &PesFan1.Visible = False Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PESCPF' &PesCpf1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PESFAN' &PesFan1.Visible = True EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'EnableDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &PesCpf2.Visible = False &PesFan2.Visible = False Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PESCPF' &PesCpf2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PESFAN' &PesFan2.Visible = True EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'EnableDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &PesCpf3.Visible = False &PesFan3.Visible = False Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PESCPF' &PesCpf3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PESFAN' &PesFan3.Visible = True EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'ResetDynFilters' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 = False &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PESCPF' &PesCpf2.SetEmpty() Do 'EnableDynamicFilters2' &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 = False &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PESCPF' &PesCpf3.SetEmpty() Do 'EnableDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do Excel' Do 'LoadGridState' ExportwpMonitoraCertificados_2.Call(&ExcelFilename, &ErrorMessage) If (&ExcelFilename <> "") Link(&ExcelFilename) Else msg(&ErrorMessage) Endif /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do exportemail' do 'exporttemail' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do SalvaFiltros' saveColumnsSelectorState.Call('FLT#wpMonitoraCertificadosColumnsSelector', '1') wpMonitoraCertificados.Link() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do NaoSalvar' saveColumnsSelectorState.Call('FLT#wpMonitoraCertificadosColumnsSelector', '2') wpMonitoraCertificados.Link() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do Teste1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do Teste2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'LoadGridState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ // Load grid state from session. If &Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState") = !"" &GridState.FromXml(LoadGridState.Udp(&PgmName + !"GridState")) Else &GridState.FromXml(&Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState")) Endif &OrderedBy = &GridState.OrderedBy &OrderedDsc = &GridState.OrderedDsc Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' For &GridStateFilterValue in &GridState.FilterValues Do Case Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PESTIP" &PesTip.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PESAVICER" &PesAviCer.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"FILTROPESRAZ" &FiltroPesRaz.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PESCOD" &PesCod.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PESDTAVCTCER" &PesDtaVctCer.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) &PesDtaVctCer_To.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.ValueTo) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"MESPESDTAVCTCER" &MesPesDtaVctCer.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PESSTS" &PesSts.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PESISCLI" &PesIsCli.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PESESCCTBCOD" &PesEscCtbCod.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) EndCase EndFor Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' If not &GridState.PageSize.Trim().IsEmpty() Grid.Rows = &GridState.PageSize.ToNumeric() EndIf Grid.CurrentPage = &GridState.CurrentPage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'LoadDynFiltersState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ AddDynamicFilters1.Visible = True RemoveDynamicFilters1.Visible = False AddDynamicFilters2.Visible = True RemoveDynamicFilters2.Visible = False If &GridState.DynamicFilters.Count >= 1 &GridStateDynamicFilter = &GridState.DynamicFilters.Item(1) &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PESCPF' &PesCpf1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PESFAN' &PesFan1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) EndCase Do 'EnableDynamicFilters1' If &GridState.DynamicFilters.Count >= 2 JSDynamicFilters.Caption = !'' EndIf EndIf If &DynamicFiltersRemoving JSDynamicFilters.Caption = '' EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'SaveGridState' &FiltroKey = 'FLT#wpMonitoraCertificadosColumnsSelector' &UmZero = LoadColumnsSelectorState.Udp(&FiltroKey) Do CAse Case &UmZero = '2' &SalvarFiltro = false Case &UmZero = '1' &SalvarFiltro = true Otherwise RetornaConfUsuario.Call(&Context.EmpCod, &Context.PesCod, domConfUsuario.Uconf001_PadraoFiltro, &UmZero) if &UmZero = '2' &SalvarFiltro = false Else &SalvarFiltro = true EndiF EndCase if &SalvarFiltro = true Endif /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &GridState.FromXml(&Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState")) // Save grid state in session. &GridState.OrderedBy = &OrderedBy &GridState.OrderedDsc = &OrderedDsc &GridState.FilterValues.Clear() WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"PESTIP", "", not &PesTip.IsEmpty(), 0, &PesTip, '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"PESAVICER", "", not &PesAviCer.IsEmpty(), 0, &PesAviCer, '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"FILTROPESRAZ", "", not &FiltroPesRaz.IsEmpty(), 0, &FiltroPesRaz, '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"PESCOD", "", not &PesCod.IsEmpty(), 0, &PesCod.ToString().Trim(), '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"PESDTAVCTCER", "", not (&PesDtaVctCer.IsEmpty() AND &PesDtaVctCer_To.IsEmpty()), 0, &PesDtaVctCer.ToString().Trim(), &PesDtaVctCer_To.ToString().Trim()) WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"MESPESDTAVCTCER", "", not &MesPesDtaVctCer.IsEmpty(), 0, &MesPesDtaVctCer.ToString().Trim(), '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"PESSTS", "", not &PesSts.IsEmpty(), 0, &PesSts, '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"PESISCLI", "", not &PesIsCli.IsEmpty(), 0, &PesIsCli.ToString().Trim(), '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"PESESCCTBCOD", "", not &PesEscCtbCod.IsEmpty(), 0, &PesEscCtbCod.ToString().Trim(), '') Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' &GridState.PageSize = str(Grid.Rows) &GridState.CurrentPage = Grid.CurrentPage SaveGridState.Call(&PgmName + !"GridState", &GridState.ToXml()) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'SaveDynFiltersState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &GridState.DynamicFilters.Clear() If not &DynamicFiltersIgnoreFirst &GridStateDynamicFilter = new() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected = &DynamicFiltersSelector1 Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PESCPF' AND not &PesCpf1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PesCpf1.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PESFAN' AND not &PesFan1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PesFan1.ToString() EndCase If &DynamicFiltersRemoving OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value.IsEmpty() &GridState.DynamicFilters.Add(&GridStateDynamicFilter) EndIf EndIf If &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 &GridStateDynamicFilter = new() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected = &DynamicFiltersSelector2 Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PESCPF' AND not &PesCpf2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PesCpf2.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PESFAN' AND not &PesFan2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PesFan2.ToString() EndCase If &DynamicFiltersRemoving OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value.IsEmpty() &GridState.DynamicFilters.Add(&GridStateDynamicFilter) EndIf EndIf If &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 &GridStateDynamicFilter = new() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected = &DynamicFiltersSelector3 Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PESCPF' AND not &PesCpf3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PesCpf3.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PESFAN' AND not &PesFan3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PesFan3.ToString() EndCase If &DynamicFiltersRemoving OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value.IsEmpty() &GridState.DynamicFilters.Add(&GridStateDynamicFilter) EndIf EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'PrepareTransaction' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &TrnContext = new() &TrnContext.CallerObject = &Pgmname &TrnContext.CallerOnDelete = True &TrnContext.CallerURL = &HTTPRequest.ScriptName + !"?" + &HTTPRequest.QueryString &TrnContext.TransactionName = !"Pessoa" &Session.Set(!"TrnContext", &TrnContext.ToXml()) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'DoExportReport' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ // Generate PDF file. Do 'LoadGridState' InNewWindow1.Target = ExportReportwpMonitoraCertificados.Link() InNewWindow1.Height = !'600' InNewWindow1.Width = !'800' InNewWindow1.OpenWindow() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Event limpar_Datas.Click &PesDtaVctCer.SetEmpty() &PesDtaVctCer_To.SetEmpty() Refresh EndEvent Sub 'exporttemail' For each order EmpCod PesDtaVctCer PesRaz using DSwpMonitoraCertificados(&PesTip, &PesAviCer, &FiltroPesRaz, &PesCod, &PesDtaVctCer, &PesDtaVctCer_To, &MesPesDtaVctCer, &PesSts , &PesIsCli, &PesEscCtbCod, &DynamicFiltersSelector1, &PesCpf1, &PesFan1, &DynamicFiltersEnabled2, &DynamicFiltersSelector2 , &PesCpf2, &PesFan2, &DynamicFiltersEnabled3, &DynamicFiltersSelector3, &PesCpf3, &PesFan3) &IsAchou = false for &SdtEmailItem in &SdtEmail if &SdtEmailItem.EmlUrl = PesEml &IsAchou = true Exit Endif EndFor if &IsAchou = false &SdtEmailItem = new() &SdtEmailItem.EmlUrl = PesEml &SdtEmail.Add(&SdtEmailItem) Endif EndFor for &SdtEmailItem in &SdtEmail &Mensagem += &SdtEmailItem.EmlUrl.Trim() + '; ' EndFor padraousuario.Call('G', '#EMAILEXPORT#', &Context.PesCod, &Context.EmpCod, &Mensagem, &PadDtaMod) WpExportarEmails.Popup() EndSub

/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
